title: Patatas Bravas
description: A classic Spanish tapas dish, Patatas Bravas consists of crispy fried potatoes in a spicy tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the diced tomato and cook until the tomatoes start to break down.
Add the spicy sauce, salt, sugar, and ground cumin. Stir well.
Meanwhile, peel the potatoes and cut them into 1-inch cubes.
Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a separate pan over medium-high heat.
Fry the potato cubes until they're golden brown and crispy.
Drain the potatoes on paper towels and add them to the tomato sauce.
Toss the potatoes in the sauce until they're well coated.
